message:
feat: expand gate modules with integration tests and refine transfer governance gate

Concurrent agent work on engine subsystems:

Source modifications:
- compression_residual_gate.rs: expand gate evaluation logic with
  additional residual computation paths
- extension_host_lifecycle.rs: add lifecycle event emission hooks
- js_runtime_lane.rs: expand JS runtime lane with additional execution
  path handling
- module_async_evaluation.rs: refine async evaluation scheduling logic
- transfer_governance_gate.rs: major refactoring to streamline gate
  evaluation, reducing redundant paths (-1545/+780 net reduction)

New integration test suites:
- adversarial_supremacy_synthesis_integration
- benchmark_coverage_saturation_gate_integration
- hardware_board_claim_gate_integration
- hostcall_session_governance_gate_integration
- regexp_string_governance_gate_integration
- resource_certificate_governance_gate_integration
- transfer_governance_gate_integration

Updated test suites:
- compression_residual_gate_integration: expanded test coverage
- js_runtime_lane_integration: new test scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
